title: Clearer Water
description: Makes water 50% clearer for those hard days of fishing!
body:
Makes the water texture **50% clearer**!! Whether you like to be able to see the fish you're trying to catch or you just like to look at the ocean floor this is the texture pack for you! 

## SHOULD WORK ON ~~ALL~~ _MOST_ MINECRAFT VERSIONS!
(ignore the warning when installing pack saying that it doesn't work on this version - it does)

[![PMC](https://github.com/coolbot100s/Bouncy-Leaves/assets/76798835/0b2c0293-c2ab-4956-9055-70bc7d7141c5)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/clearer-water-6307561/) [![Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy-minimal/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/qrdMTwHHnb)
